basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 MTS, Driver Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST) Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) / Driver (Non-Technical) (DR) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.neist.res.in . A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR NEIST Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) / Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 25 years for MTS, Max 27 years for Driver
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for MTS: 25 years Maximum Age Limit for Driver: 27 years

qualification.details: Multi-Tasking Staff (Post Code : MTS): Matriculation or equivalent pass. Desirable Qualification: Intermediate (12th class) pass. Driver (Non-Technical) (Post Code : DR): Refer to CSIR-NEIST Website www.neist.res.in

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEIST to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSIR NEIST recruitment is 04-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for MTS and Driver posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies. 9 vacancies are for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post and 1 vacancy is for the Driver (Non-Technical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post is Matriculation or an equivalent pass. An Intermediate (12th class) pass is considered a desirable qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the MTS and Driver posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post is 25 years, and for the Driver (Non-Technical) post, it is 27 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both MTS and Driver posts ranges from Rs. 33,375 to Rs. 36,700 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official CSIR NEIST website. The application process involves filling out the online form, uploading necessary documents, and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are recommended to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of CSIR NEIST?
faq.answer: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST) is located in Jorhat, Assam, with the pincode 785006.
